title: Junior Revenue Manager at Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates!
